ogTitle: Curl Curl vs Curlewis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Curl Curl and Curlewis.
heading: Curl Curl vs Curlewis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Curl Curl, New South Wales and Curlewis, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Curlewis has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Curl Curl (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Curl Curl or Curlewis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Curl Curl has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Curlewis scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Curl Curl scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Curlewis scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Curl Curl or Curlewis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Curlewis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
